assessment_summary: This video shows a medical simulation center demonstration with high-fidelity patient simulators (mannequins) in a hospital setting. Multiple healthcare professionals in white coats are observing demonstrations on patient simulators with monitoring equipment. This appears to be a news segment about UT Hospital's Center for Advanced Medical Simulation showcasing their training facilities and equipment. No FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) tasks are visible - no laparoscopic trainers, peg transfer boards, suturing tasks, or endoloop procedures are shown.
confidence_rationale: Clear visual evidence shows patient simulation mannequins, hospital setting, and news media context rather than FLS training equipment or tasks
